cards.back: The process of converting plaintext into unreadable ciphertext to protect data from unauthorized access
The process of converting ciphertext back into readable plaintext
A network security system that monitors and controls incoming and outgoing network traffic based on predetermined security rules
The unauthorized access, use, disclosure, disruption, modification, or destruction of sensitive data
The three main goals of data security: ensuring that data is confidential (not accessed by unauthorized parties), intact (not modified or deleted), and available (accessible when needed)
